equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: the specific CLI-agent codec separation is absent from the audited repos.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE or CLIAgentRequest codec path exists locally, so CLI agent extraction cannot decode its own codec instead of DKMS input.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-precompile-codecs/src/validation.rs has DkmsKeyRequest handling for DKMS_KEY_PRECOMPILE and no CLI-agent branch.
crates/ritual-precompile-addresses/src/lib.rs defines DKMS and persistent/sovereign agent addresses but no CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE.
The evidence files crates/ritual-async/src/detector.rs and crates/ritual-async/src/validation.rs are not present in the port checkout.

notes: Searches covered the renamed validation crate as well as the original evidence paths.
rationale: The combined diff separates CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE into a CLIAgentRequest::from_abi branch and leaves DKMS_KEY_PRECOMPILE on DkmsKeyRequest extraction. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: For CLI_AGENT_PRECOMPILE, async precompile data extraction must decode CLIAgentRequest to obtain executor and TTL, rather than treating CLI agent input as DKMS key input.
suggested_falsification_tests: Encode a valid CLIAgentRequest and assert detector and RPC validation extract its executor and TTL; assert the same bytes are not required to satisfy DkmsKeyRequest decoding.
summary: CLI agent codec decoding is not present locally.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Encode a CLIAgentRequest and assert detector/RPC validation extract executor and TTL without DKMS decoding; no local CLI-agent codec is available to run this path.
title: CLI agent decodes with its own codec
